heading: ADJUSTMENT FOR PROPERTY VALUE AFFECTED BY STATE OF DISASTER
operative_text: (a) For purposes of Chapters 46 and 49 and this chapter, the commissioner shall adjust the taxable value of property of a school district all or part of which is located in an area declared a disaster area by the governor under Chapter 418, Government Code, as necessary to ensure that the district receives funding based as soon as possible on property values as affected by the disaster. (b) The commissioner may fund adjustments under this section using funds specifically appropriated for the purpose or other funds available to the commissioner for that purpose. (c) A decision of the commissioner under this section is final and may not be appealed.
_note: No defined terms explicitly defined within this section. Cross-references to Chapters 46, 49, and Government Code Chapter 418 are referenced operationally; Section 42.2523 referenced in legislative history as prior source.
